{
  "claims": [
    "Elaine Brown is the only woman to ever lead the Black Panther Party.",
    "Elaine Brown spent 25 years advocating for the release of an innocent Black man convicted at the age of 13.",
    "Elaine Brown is currently constructing a 79-unit all-affordable apartment complex in Oakland.",
    "Elaine Brown helped establish the Black Panther Party's first Free Breakfast for Children program in Los Angeles.",
    "Elaine Brown chaired the Black Panther Party from 1974 until 1977.",
    "Elaine Brown founded the non-profit organization Fields of Flowers, Inc., to provide educational opportunities for impoverished African-American children.",

    "Elaine Brown is CEO of Oakland & the World Enterprises, Inc., dedicated to launching businesses for cooperative ownership by formerly incarcerated individuals and others facing economic barriers.",
    "Oakland & the World Enterprises, Inc. is currently developing a 79-unit 100% affordable housing complex for individuals with very low and extremely low incomes.",
